school_12: Amity International School Mayur Vihar, Delhi
project_1_title: Portfolio Optimization Model for Indian Market
project_1_description: Developed a predictive model to estimate stock price volatility over 90 and 180 trading days, aiding portfolio diversification across Indian stock market sectors. Implemented Modern Portfolio Theory (MPT) using optimization techniques to create an optimized portfolio, balancing risk and return effectively.
project_2_description: Developed an engaging Stick Hero game clone featuring a stickman character collecting cherries. Utilized JavaFX for building an intuitive GUI, applying robust object-oriented programming and design patterns. Integrated Junit for comprehensive unit testing and multithreading for enhanced performance.
project_3_description: Developedthreekeycomponents: SimpleScheduler,SimpleShell,andSmartLoaderto simulate an operating system. Implemented a priority-based Simple Scheduler in C for efficient CPU time allocation. CreatedSimpleShellwithUnix-likecommand-linecapabilities,facilitatingprocessman- agement and pipeline execution. Designed Smart Loader to optimize the loading of 32-bit ELF executables, incorporating lazy loading techniques for efficiency.
project_4_description: Built a responsive e-commerce platform for Myntra clothing, focusing on user-friendly interfaceanddesign. Implementedkeyfeaturessuchasuserregistration,login,shopping cart management, and order history tracking. Managedconflictsandconflictingtransactionstoensuredataintegrityandusersatisfac- tion. Implementedrobusterror-handlingmechanismsandtransactionrollbackstrategies to maintain reliability and trustworthiness of the platform.
indproj_1_title: Research Investigation: Impact of JL Lemma Variations
indproj_1_description: Conducted an in-depth investigation of the Johnson-Lindenstrauss lemma, using Matplotlib to visualize how varying the number of dimensions affects data representation and integrity. Utilized Support Vector Machine (SVM) techniques to classify data, evaluating the stability of these classifications under different transformation parameters.
work_1_description: Working under the guidance of Dr. Vikram Goyal and Dr. Saket Anand at IIIT Delhi on a road safety initiative for the National Highway Authority of India (NHAI). Currently Focused on developing traffic sign detection and classification systems using computer vision and deep learning to enhance highway safety and traffic management.
